_comment: Authored dishes are the primary pool. Each carries: section, biomes (where it's native OR 'any'), seasons, tier_min/max (inn-tier gating), cost (1-5), tags for cultural/cuisine context, excludes_conditions (famine/war/plague/isolation/siege). A dish can be marked imported:true with imported_price_mult to represent trade goods that get a price hike outside their native biome and disappear under certain conditions. An optional 'flavor' field is a short description the LLM polish layer can use verbatim.

dishes.name: Spiced wine
dishes.flavor: Sweet, warm and infused with cinnamon, ginger and clove.

dishes.name: Spinach pie with chervil and eggs
Mountain-style rat skewer with Bulgan chard
Barley, cucumber and pork kidney soup
Poached egg and garlic bacon soup
Herring strips with onion and cucumber
Barbarian meatballs
dishes.flavor: Minced beef, flattened, grilled over open fire.

dishes.name: Fresh peas with parsley and mint
Red snapper and cream of pumpkin soup
Skewered mole, onion and white radish
Reindeer quarters with pomegranate
dishes.flavor: Northern game meets southern trade.

dishes.name: May eggs
dishes.flavor: poached eggs in butter sauce

dishes.name: Hake with garlic and almond sauce
Halibut fillet with ginger and garlic
Trout casserole with onions and turnips
Roast chicken with orange juice glaze
Cod with butter and fennel seeds
Chicken in a cream and wine sauce
Seal fat porridge
dishes.flavor: Oats boiled grey in blubber. Sticks to the ribs and the spoon.

dishes.name: Lichen bread
dishes.flavor: Scraped from rock, pounded with rye. Chewed slow.

dishes.name: Fermented reindeer soup
dishes.flavor: Old meat, older broth. The smell does the work.

dishes.name: Cave bear stew
dishes.flavor: Three days in a covered pot. The fat could grease a wheel.

dishes.name: Forest roots in pork fat
dishes.flavor: What the woods gave and what the pig left behind.

dishes.name: Warmed birch sap
dishes.flavor: Faintly sweet. Mostly water.

dishes.name: Black bread and honey
dishes.flavor: Yesterday's loaf, a smear of comb. Wax coats the teeth.

dishes.name: Whale skin crisps with cloudberries
dishes.flavor: Skin cut thin and fried hard. A thumb of yellow pickle on the side.

dishes.name: Spit-roasted albatross
dishes.flavor: A bird the size of a child. Killing one brings storms. They eat them anyway.

dishes.name: Smoked elk shoulder with watercress
dishes.flavor: A fortnight over alder smoke. The greens are a courtesy.

dishes.name: Blood pudding with birch syrup
dishes.flavor: Blood, oats, suet, bound in gut. Sweetened at the plate.

dishes.name: Fermented trout in birch bark
dishes.flavor: Six weeks buried. Pulled apart with the fingers.

dishes.name: Reindeer tartare with fern ash and mint
dishes.flavor: Scraped fine with a knife. Black ash, green herb.

dishes.name: Honey custard with cured petals
dishes.flavor: Scattered with wild rose dried in salt. A dish for people who have never been hungry.

dishes.name: Pine needle tea
dishes.flavor: Said to fend off the cough.

dishes.name: Curds with bilberry
dishes.flavor: Strained in linen. Berries crushed on top with the back of a spoon.

dishes.name: Megaceront ribs in pine and thyme
dishes.flavor: One rib feeds three. Carved at table.

dishes.name: Raw whale, salt and dill
dishes.flavor: Loin sliced paper-thin. Salt and dill on cold stone.

dishes.name: Auroch steak with red butter and coriander
dishes.flavor: Seared hard. Butter the colour of dried blood.

dishes.name: Cured reindeer heart
dishes.flavor: Salted, hung through winter. Sliced translucent.

dishes.name: Barley cake with birch syrup
dishes.flavor: Soaked in cream at the table, poured over by the kitchen girl.

dishes.name: The Mariner's Cup
dishes.flavor: Shark blood warmed with honey and spirit. Drunk from a horn.

dishes.name: Stuffed albatross with fermented berries
dishes.flavor: Boned whole, packed with pork, mint and roots. The berries do what wine cannot.

dishes.name: Whale loin in black butter
dishes.flavor: Seared rare. Butter cooked till it smokes. The plate arrives silent.

dishes.name: Crowberry cordial on ice
dishes.flavor: Pressed and steeped in spirit. Served over lake ice, dark as a hoofprint.

dishes.name: Rabbit pie with sea herbs
dishes.flavor: Wild rabbit baked under a crust of samphire and thyme.

dishes.name: Venison loin in salt-fish sauce
dishes.flavor: An old coastal kitchen trick — fermented anchovy darkens the gravy.

dishes.name: Wild boar braised in juniper and cider
Salt cod stew with winter roots
dishes.flavor: The cod travels in barrels. The roots are whatever the cellar still has.

dishes.name: Marinated entrails of large fish
dishes.flavor: The exact species is left to one's imagination.

dishes.name: Salmon smoked in dill with dark rye bread
dishes.flavor: Cold-smoked over alder. The rye is heavy enough to stand under it.

dishes.name: Scallops in shells with garlic and herbs
dishes.flavor: Served on the half-shell, butter pooling at the base.

dishes.name: Fin stew
dishes.flavor: Trimmings the fishmonger sets aside. Simmered down to gelatin.

dishes.name: Serving of krill
dishes.flavor: A pink heap, eaten by the spoonful with vinegar.

dishes.name: Sautéed cod tongues
dishes.flavor: Pulled at the dock for a copper a sack. Crisped in butter.

dishes.name: Pickled whale blubber
dishes.flavor: Cubes the colour of old wax. Sour brine masks the fat.

dishes.name: Stuffed fish stomach
dishes.flavor: Packed with bread, herbs and what didn't sell. Sewn shut and poached.

dishes.name: Boar head broth
dishes.flavor: The skull boiled long. The marrow does the seasoning.

dishes.name: Chopped ham
dishes.flavor: Hacked from the leg with a cleaver. No knife required to eat it.

dishes.name: Offal and leek pie
dishes.flavor: Heart, lung, kidney — what was left. Bound under a hard crust.

dishes.name: Sheep liver sausage
dishes.flavor: Coarse-ground, dark, iron-bitter.

dishes.name: Rye and ale porridge
dishes.flavor: Rye boiled in flat ale. Eaten hot to keep the chill out.

dishes.name: Frog and snail pot
dishes.flavor: Both gathered from the same wet stones. Stewed with garlic and vinegar.

dishes.name: Hare stew with breadcrumbs and mushrooms
dishes.flavor: The crumbs thicken what the cellar mushrooms cannot.

dishes.name: Day old bread with lard
dishes.flavor: Rubbed with a clove of garlic. Salted heavy.

dishes.name: Sheep head jelly
dishes.flavor: Set in its own broth. Quivers when the table is bumped.

dishes.name: Chicken stock with leeks and prunes
dishes.flavor: An old hen simmered with leeks and dried plums until both fall apart.

dishes.name: Toast with potato and pork bits
dishes.flavor: Crusts piled with mashed root and crackling scraps.

dishes.name: Cellar pottage with flatbread
dishes.flavor: Whatever the cellar gives, slow-boiled. Bread used as spoon.

dishes.name: Windfall apples
dishes.flavor: Bruised, fly-marked, nearly free.

dishes.name: Oat porridge with salt
dishes.flavor: Salt is the only seasoning the kitchen gives away.

dishes.name: Sour ram testicles pickled in whey
dishes.flavor: Sliced cold. Sharp as the look the host gives the squeamish.

dishes.name: Serving of crawfish
dishes.flavor: Boiled red in salted river water. Piled high, peeled at the table.

dishes.name: Roasted beetle grubs
dishes.flavor: Skewered like beads. Burst sweet between the teeth.

dishes.name: Leaf wrapped lizard
dishes.flavor: Whole, gutted, packed in fig leaves and buried under coals.

dishes.name: Maize flour porridge
dishes.flavor: Yellow, thick, eaten with a wooden paddle.

dishes.name: Bean stew with coriander and palm oil
dishes.flavor: Red oil rises to the surface. Coriander stems thrown in whole.

dishes.name: Sumac chicken with bulgur
dishes.flavor: Tart with crushed berry. Grain steamed in the bird's own fat.

dishes.name: Orchard cider
dishes.flavor: Pressed in late summer. The autumn batch runs darker and bites sharper.

dishes.name: Healer's botanical
dishes.flavor: A tincture, really. The innkeep pours it slow and says nothing.

dishes.name: Mulled cider
dishes.flavor: Warmed with clove and peel. Smells like the end of the harvest.

dishes.name: Honey wine
dishes.flavor: Still fermenting, some say. Tastes like it.

dishes.name: Sumac water
dishes.flavor: Red from the berry, tart, served cool.

dishes.name: Date wine
dishes.flavor: More food than drink by some accounts.

dishes.name: Mint leaves infusion
dishes.flavor: Provided free to those with nothing.

dishes.name: Fig sherbet over shaved ice
dishes.flavor: Crushed figs over ice shaved from the cold-room. Eaten with a small spoon.

dishes.name: Anise spirit
dishes.flavor: Clear and sharp. Turns white in water.

dishes.name: Rosewater cordial
dishes.flavor: Syrup of rose, diluted and chilled. More for show than thirst.

dishes.name: Pinebud spirit
dishes.flavor: Distilled in monastery cellars from the first buds. One cup is enough.

dishes.name: Cranberry brandy
dishes.flavor: Pressed and twice-distilled. Pours red, finishes dry.

dishes.name: Malt aquavit
dishes.flavor: Rough and reliable.

dishes.name: Oyster stout
dishes.flavor: Brewed with liquor from the shucking barrel. Black, briny, thick.

dishes.name: Brine and citrus cordial
dishes.flavor: Salt-rim optional.

dishes.name: Samphire liquor
dishes.flavor: Salt-marsh herb spirit. Smells of low tide.

dishes.name: Sour whey spirit
dishes.flavor: What's left after the cheese is made, fermented and distilled.

dishes.name: Small thaw beer
dishes.flavor: Light and slightly sour. Made for the brief warm. Does not keep.

dishes.name: Ice cellar ale
dishes.flavor: Kept in permafrost pits. Summer makes it drinkable.
